overview.description: The State Street Loomis Sayles Opportunistic Bond ETF (OBND) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively-managed fund that seeks to maximize total return by holding a broad basket of predominantly USD-denominated bonds. OBND was launched on Sep 27, 2021 and is issued by State Street.
